basic_details.job_title: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 17 Dy Manager, Executive and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Dy Manager / Assistant Manager (Operation), Executive (Operation), Associate (Operation)
basic_details.short_information: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited has released the official Dy Manager / Assistant Manager (Operation), Executive (Operation), Associate (Operation) Notification 2026 on 13 May 2026 at ncdc.in. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced under the Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Operation Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between Max: 40 years with a qualification of Graduate, MBA/PGDM in Operations and relevant experience can apply via email from 13 May 2026 to 31 May 2026. The official notification PDF and email application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation may be given to highly deserving candidates.

qualification.details: Dy Manager / Assistant Manager (Operation): Graduate with MBA/PGDM (Operations) from an institution of repute. Dy Manager: Minimum 7 years relevant experience; Assistant Manager: Minimum 5 years relevant experience. Experience in ride-hailing organisation preferred. Executive (Operation): Graduate with MBA/PGDM (Operations) from an institution of repute. Minimum 4 years experience. Experience in ride-hailing organisation preferred. Associate (Operation): Graduate from an institution of repute. Minimum 3 years experience. Experience in ride-hailing organisation preferred.

salary_details.details: Dy Manager: ₹13.75 LPA (CTC includes Basic Pay, HRA as per place of posting, Conveyance and Mobile phone expenses) Assistant Manager: ₹11.40 LPA (CTC includes Basic Pay, HRA as per place of posting, Conveyance and Mobile phone expenses) Executive (Operation): ₹7.62 LPA (CTC includes Basic Pay, HRA as per place of posting, Conveyance and Mobile phone expenses) Associate (Operation): ₹5 LPA (CTC includes Basic Pay, HRA as per place of posting, Conveyance and Mobile phone expenses)

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 31-05-2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited?
faq.answer: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited has announced a total of 17 vacancies for various posts in its recent recruitment notification for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post. Generally, a Graduate degree is required, with an MBA/PGDM in Operations being necessary for Dy Manager, Assistant Manager, and Executive roles. Associate roles require a Graduate degree.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the candidates applying for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 40 years. However, age relaxation might be provided to highly deserving candidates as per the organization's policy.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the different positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from ₹5 LPA for Associate (Operation) to ₹13.75 LPA for Dy Manager. The CTC includes basic pay, HRA, conveyance, and mobile phone expenses.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply via email. They must prepare their application with all necessary details and documents and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the advertised positions is Contractual. This means the employment will be on a contract basis for a specified period.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for positions in Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification and application link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can download the PDF and follow the application instructions provided.
